description: Insert three mathematical formula objects into the classical mechanics lecture presentation at /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/classical_mechanics.odp using the LibreOffice Math editor. On Slide 2 ('Newton's Second Law'), insert the formula 'F = m times a'. On Slide 3 ('Kinetic Energy'), insert 'E_k = {1} over {2} m v^2'. On Slide 4 ('Mass-Energy Equivalence'), insert 'E = m c^2'. Use embedded Formula objects (OLE) rather than text boxes and save the updated presentation.
